your-show-key.title: Your Show Title
your-show-key.notes: Deep-synthesis show: every episode gets its own note under Library/podcasts/your-show-key/. Key is kebab-case; url is the channel's /videos page or a playlist. Tags come from the approved list in AGENTS.md.

daily-news-example.title: A Daily News Podcast
daily-news-example.notes: World-context show: monthly digests only (consolidate_world_context.py), never one note per episode. source=rss reads the feed; omit source for YouTube shows.
